sql.query: SELECT wc.id,wc.workflowId,wc.contactId,wc.relationshipType,wc.isPrimary,wc.notes,c.displayName,c.organisationName,COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ',c.firstName,c.lastName)),''),NULLIF(c.displayName,''),NULLIF(c.organisationName,''),'Unnamed contact') AS contactName,COALESCE(cc.categoryName,c.contactType) AS categoryName,c.email,c.phone FROM tbl_workflow_contacts wc INNER JOIN tbl_workflows w ON w.id=wc.workflowId AND w.tenantId=wc.tenantId INNER JOIN tbl_contacts c ON c.id=wc.contactId AND c.tenantId=wc.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_contact_categories cc ON cc.contactCategoryId=c.contactCategoryId AND cc.tenantId=c.tenantId WHERE wc.workflowId=:workflowId AND wc.tenantId=:tenantId ORDER BY wc.isPrimary DESC,wc.relationshipType,contactName
